title: Red Velvet Ribbon 20mm x 20yards – Luxurious Soft Velvet Ribbon for Gift Wrapping, Holiday Crafts, Wedding Decorations and Festive Bows
features: 🎀 Luxurious Velvet Texture – Made of soft, high-quality velvet fabric, offering a plush feel and rich look that elevates any decoration.
📏 Generous Size – Each roll measures 20mm wide and 18m long, giving you plenty of ribbon for gift wrapping, floral arrangements, crafts, and décor.
❤️ Vibrant Red Colour – The deep red velvet adds a festive touch, perfect for Christmas, weddings, Valentine’s Day, and other celebrations.
✂️ Easy to Use & Cut – Conveniently rolled for easy storage and use; simply cut the length you need for bows, trims, or wrapping.
🎄 Multi-Purpose Decoration – Ideal for gift wrapping, holiday crafts, wedding décor, party decorations, and DIY projects all year round.
description: Add a touch of luxury and elegance to your festive creations with our Red Velvet Ribbon (20mm x 20yards). Crafted from high-quality velvet fabric, this ribbon features a soft, plush texture and a rich red colour that instantly enhances the look of your decorations. Whether you’re wrapping Christmas presents, creating wedding bouquets, or designing festive bows, this velvet ribbon provides the perfect balance of beauty and durability. The ribbon comes on a convenient roll, making it easy to cut to your desired length . With 18 metres of ribbon, you have plenty to work with for multiple projects – from gift wrapping to seasonal crafts and home décor. Its vibrant red shade remains bright and elegant throughout the season, ensuring your decorations always look their best. Perfect for Christmas, weddings, birthdays, and special occasions, this ribbon is a must-have for every crafter and decorator.
